title: Friends Pays Tributes To Lekan Ajayi Father,  Colonel (Barr) Jonathan Olusegun Ajakaiye Ajayi (Rtd)
description: Friends and well wishers thronged Lagos State on Friday May 20, 2022, to join the Principal Manager at the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) Corporate Communication Department, Mr. Olalekan Ajayi to honou
html:
Friends and well wishers thronged Lagos State on Friday May 20, 2022, to join the Principal Manager at the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) Corporate Communication Department, Mr. Olalekan Ajayi to honour and pay tributes as he gave his father a befitting burial, whom he described as a man who lived an exemplary and fulfilled life.

All the roads in Lagos State were flung opened in celebration of the life and times of Colonel (Barr.) Jonathan Olusegun Ajakaiye Ajayi, who had died on 19th April, 2022 at the age of 75.
